headlines.headline: Xovol Goods begins scheduled maintenance of process automation systems

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event that typically has minimal impact on financial performance.

headlines.headline: Xovol Goods completes strategic acquisition to strengthen supply chain optimization

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
